prompt: Please analyze this docker-compose configuration and let me know if there are improvements I should make.

assertions.text: Identifies orphan network (backend defined but unused)
Identifies both build and image specified on api service
Identifies healthcheck timeout >= interval issue on db
Identifies missing security options (cap_drop, read_only, no-new-privileges)
Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
Uses rule IDs (e.g. CV-M007, CV-B008) to reference violations
Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
Provides fix recommendations with before/after examples
